diseases.name: Common Cold
diseases.description: Viral infection of the upper respiratory tract

diseases.name: Influenza
diseases.description: Viral infection affecting the respiratory system
diseases.treatment: Rest, fluids, antiviral medications if prescribed

diseases.name: Migraine
diseases.description: Severe recurring headache often accompanied by other symptoms
diseases.treatment: Pain relievers, rest in dark room, prescription medications

diseases.name: Pneumonia
diseases.description: Infection that inflames air sacs in lungs

diseases.name: Heart Attack
diseases.description: Blockage of blood flow to the heart
